name: decision-stress-test-gate
description: A Codex workflow plugin that pressure-tests products, startups, side projects, accounts, investments, partnerships, job changes, and major decisions by identifying fatal assumptions, failure scenarios, VC-style objections, alternatives, validation plans, and continue-adjust-pause recommendations.

interface.shortDescription: 做决定前先审判：它最可能怎么死？
interface.longDescription: 在做产品、AI Agent、副业、创业、投资、合伙、账号、换工作或重大决策前，先找出致命假设、半年后失败原因、VC 拷问问题、替代方案和 7 天现实验证计划。
defaultPrompt: 使用 decision-stress-test-gate 帮我压力测试这个想法。
先不要鼓励我，帮我找出这个项目最可能怎么死。
帮我找出这个决策最致命的 3 个假设。
